name: Sliding Window Maximum
category: Stack and Queues [Learning, Pre-In-Post-fix, Monotonic Stack, Implementation]
statement: Given an array of integers arr, there is a sliding window of size k which is moving from the very left of the array to the very right. You can only see the k numbers in the window. Each time the sliding window moves right by one position. Return the max sliding window.

examples.explanation: For each window of size k=3, we find the maximum element in the window and add it to our output array.
There’s just one window of size 2 that is possible and the maximum of the two elements is our answer.
